toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達從過去持續到現在的動作或狀態，或對現在仍有影響的過去經驗。常與 already, yet, just, ever, never, since, for, recently, lately 等副詞連用。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + p.p. (+ since/for/already/yet/just)

examples.en: The marketing team has already submitted the quarterly report.
examples.zh: 行銷團隊已經繳交了季度報告。

examples.en: Our company has expanded into three new markets since 2020.
examples.zh: 我們公司自2020年以來已拓展至三個新市場。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達在過去某一時間點之前已經完成的動作，強調兩個過去動作之間的先後順序。常與 by the time, before, after, when 連用。
toeic.structure: S + had + p.p. + ... + by the time/before/when + S + V-ed

examples.en: By the time the CEO arrived, the meeting had already started.
examples.zh: 在執行長抵達時，會議已經開始了。

examples.en: The contract had been signed before the deadline expired.
examples.zh: 合約在截止日期到期之前就已簽署。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於強調一個從過去開始並持續到現在（且可能仍在進行）的動作，著重動作的持續性與過程。常與 for, since, all day, lately 連用。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + been + V-ing + for/since + time

examples.en: The engineers have been working on the new prototype for six months.
examples.zh: 工程師們已經在這個新原型上工作了六個月。

examples.en: She has been negotiating with the supplier since last Monday.
examples.zh: 她從上週一起就一直在與供應商協商。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達在未來某一特定時間點正在進行的動作，常用於商務行程描述。
toeic.structure: S + will + be + V-ing + at/this time + future time

examples.en: This time next week, we will be presenting our proposal in Tokyo.
examples.zh: 下週這個時候，我們將在東京進行提案簡報。

examples.en: Mr. Chen will be attending the conference all day tomorrow.
examples.zh: 陳先生明天一整天都將出席會議。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達在未來某一時間點之前將已完成的動作，常與 by + 未來時間 連用。
toeic.structure: S + will + have + p.p. + by + future time

examples.en: By the end of this quarter, we will have launched three new products.
examples.zh: 到本季結束之前，我們將已推出三項新產品。

examples.en: By December, the construction team will have completed the office building.
examples.zh: 到十二月時，營建團隊將已完成這棟辦公大樓。

toeic.meaning_zh: 當動作的執行者不重要、未知或不需提及時使用被動語態，強調動作本身或受詞。常見於商業報告、公告與流程說明。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + p.p. (+ by + agent)

examples.en: All invoices are processed within five business days.
examples.zh: 所有發票會在五個工作天內處理完成。

examples.en: Customer feedback is reviewed by the quality assurance team.
examples.zh: 客戶意見回饋會由品質保證團隊審查。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達已完成的被動動作，且結果與現在相關，常見於專案進度報告。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + been + p.p.

examples.en: The new safety procedures have been implemented across all branches.
examples.zh: 新的安全程序已在所有分公司實施。

examples.en: Our annual report has been published on the company website.
examples.zh: 我們的年度報告已發布於公司網站上。

toeic.meaning_zh: 情態動詞的被動形式，用於表達義務、建議、可能性等被動意涵，常見於規範與政策說明。
toeic.structure: S + modal (must/should/can/may) + be + p.p.

examples.en: All confidential documents must be shredded before disposal.
examples.zh: 所有機密文件必須在丟棄前先碎掉。

examples.en: The application form should be submitted no later than Friday.
examples.zh: 申請表應在週五之前繳交。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於陳述普遍真理、科學事實或一般規律，主從句皆使用現在式。
toeic.structure: If + S + V (present), S + V (present)

examples.en: If customers pay within ten days, they receive a 5 percent discount.
examples.zh: 如果客戶在十天內付款，他們會獲得百分之五的折扣。

examples.en: If the temperature drops below zero, the machinery shuts down automatically.
examples.zh: 如果溫度降到零度以下，機器會自動停機。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述未來可能發生的真實情況及其結果，if 子句用現在式，主句用 will 或情態動詞。
toeic.structure: If + S + V (present), S + will/can/may + V

examples.en: If we sign the contract today, the shipment will arrive next week.
examples.zh: 如果我們今天簽約，貨物下週就會到達。

examples.en: If sales increase by 10 percent, the company will hire more staff.
examples.zh: 如果銷售增加百分之十，公司就會聘請更多員工。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述與現在事實相反或不太可能發生的假設情況，if 子句用過去式，主句用 would/could/might。
toeic.structure: If + S + V-ed/were, S + would/could + V

examples.en: If our budget were larger, we would invest in more advertising.
examples.zh: 如果我們的預算更多，就會投入更多廣告。

examples.en: If I had more time, I would attend the leadership workshop.
examples.zh: 如果我有更多時間，我就會去參加領導力研討會。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述與過去事實相反的假設情況，表達對過去的遺憾或反思。if 子句用過去完成式，主句用 would have + p.p.
toeic.structure: If + S + had + p.p., S + would/could/might have + p.p.

examples.en: If we had launched the product earlier, we would have captured more market share.
examples.zh: 如果我們更早推出產品，就會搶到更多市占率。

examples.en: If the manager had reviewed the contract, he would have noticed the error.
examples.zh: 如果經理當時審閱了合約，他就會發現那個錯誤。

toeic.meaning_zh: 混合條件句，用於表達過去條件對現在結果的影響（或反之），結合第二與第三條件句的結構。
toeic.structure: If + S + had + p.p., S + would + V (now)

examples.en: If we had hired more engineers last year, we would have a competitive product now.
examples.zh: 如果我們去年聘請更多工程師，現在就會有具競爭力的產品。

examples.en: If she were more experienced, she would have handled the crisis differently.
examples.zh: 如果她更有經驗，她當時就會以不同方式處理那次危機。

toeic.meaning_zh: 間接引述他人話語，須將時態往後推一級（現在→過去、過去→過去完成），並調整代名詞與時間副詞。
toeic.structure: S + said/told (+ O) + that + S + V (back-shifted)

examples.en: The director said that the merger would be finalized by June.
examples.zh: 董事說合併會在六月之前完成。

examples.en: He told the team that they had exceeded the sales target.
examples.zh: 他告訴團隊他們已經超越了銷售目標。

toeic.meaning_zh: 間接引述問句時，使用 if/whether（是非問句）或疑問詞（特殊問句），並改回直述句語序，不使用問號。
toeic.structure: S + asked (+ O) + if/whether/wh-word + S + V

examples.en: The interviewer asked whether I had any experience in international sales.
examples.zh: 面試官問我是否有國際業務的經驗。

examples.en: She asked when the new policy would take effect.
examples.zh: 她問新政策何時會生效。

toeic.meaning_zh: 間接引述命令或請求時，使用 to + 原形動詞 結構；否定形式為 not to + V。
toeic.structure: S + told/asked + O + (not) to + V

examples.en: The supervisor asked the staff to submit their timesheets by Friday.
examples.zh: 主管要求員工在週五之前繳交工時表。

examples.en: Security told visitors not to enter the restricted area.
examples.zh: 保全人員告訴訪客不要進入管制區。

toeic.meaning_zh: 在 recommend, suggest, request, demand, insist, propose, require 及 important/essential/necessary that 之後，子句須使用原形動詞（不論主詞或時態）。
toeic.structure: S + recommend/suggest/request/demand + that + S + V (base form)

examples.en: The board recommended that the CEO postpone the announcement.
examples.zh: 董事會建議執行長延後該項公告。

examples.en: It is essential that every employee attend the safety training.
examples.zh: 每位員工都必須出席安全訓練。

toeic.meaning_zh: 限定性關係子句用於提供必要資訊以辨識先行詞，不使用逗號分隔。who/that 用於人，which/that 用於物。
toeic.structure: Noun + who/which/that + V ...

examples.en: The candidate who has the most experience will be offered the position.
examples.zh: 經驗最豐富的應徵者將獲得錄用。

examples.en: The report that was submitted yesterday contains several errors.
examples.zh: 昨天繳交的那份報告含有幾處錯誤。

toeic.meaning_zh: 非限定性關係子句用於提供額外資訊，以逗號分隔，不可使用 that，省略後仍不影響句意完整性。
toeic.structure: Noun, who/which + V, ...

examples.en: Our CFO, who joined the firm last year, will lead the financial review.
examples.zh: 我們去年加入公司的財務長將主導這次財務審查。

examples.en: The Tokyo office, which opened in 2018, has become our largest branch.
examples.zh: 於2018年成立的東京辦公室，已成為我們最大的分公司。

toeic.meaning_zh: whose 表示所有關係，where 用於地點，when 用於時間，作為關係副詞引導關係子句。
toeic.structure: Noun + whose/where/when + S + V

examples.en: We hired a consultant whose expertise lies in digital marketing.
examples.zh: 我們聘請了一位專長在數位行銷的顧問。

examples.en: The conference room where we held the meeting is being renovated.
examples.zh: 我們開會的那間會議室正在整修。

toeic.meaning_zh: 某些動詞後只能接動名詞 (V-ing)，例如 enjoy, suggest, avoid, consider, postpone, recommend, finish, mind, deny, admit, mention, discuss。
toeic.structure: S + enjoy/suggest/avoid/consider/postpone + V-ing

examples.en: The committee suggested postponing the launch until next quarter.
examples.zh: 委員會建議將發表會延至下一季。

examples.en: We should consider outsourcing the customer service department.
examples.zh: 我們應考慮將客服部門外包。

toeic.meaning_zh: 某些動詞後只能接不定詞 (to + V)，例如 want, decide, plan, hope, expect, agree, refuse, manage, offer, fail, intend, promise, afford。
toeic.structure: S + decide/plan/agree/manage + to + V

examples.en: The board agreed to allocate additional funding for research.
examples.zh: 董事會同意撥出額外資金供研究使用。

examples.en: The supplier failed to deliver the goods on time.
examples.zh: 供應商未能準時交貨。

toeic.pattern: Verbs with Gerund or Infinitive (different meaning)
toeic.meaning_zh: remember, forget, stop, regret, try 等動詞可接動名詞或不定詞，但意義不同：V-ing 多指過去動作，to V 多指未來/目的。
toeic.structure: S + remember/forget/stop + V-ing (past) / to V (future)

examples.en: Please remember to send the invoice before leaving the office.
examples.zh: 請記得在離開辦公室前寄出發票。

examples.en: She stopped to take a phone call from a major client.
examples.zh: 她停下來接一通重要客戶的電話。

toeic.meaning_zh: -ing 形容詞描述事物的特性（令人…的），-ed 形容詞描述人的感受（感到…的）。例如 interesting/interested, confusing/confused, exciting/excited。
toeic.structure: Thing + is + V-ing (characteristic) / Person + is + V-ed (feeling)

examples.en: The training session was very informative, and all participants were satisfied.
examples.zh: 這場訓練課程非常有啟發性，所有參與者都感到滿意。

examples.en: The instructions were confusing, so the new employees felt confused.
examples.zh: 這些說明令人困惑，所以新進員工都感到困惑。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用分詞片語簡化關係子句或時間/原因子句，使句子更簡潔。主動用 V-ing，被動用 V-ed。
toeic.structure: V-ing/V-ed + ..., S + V

examples.en: Walking through the trade show, we discovered several promising vendors.
examples.zh: 走過商展時，我們發現了幾家很有潛力的廠商。

examples.en: Founded in 1995, the company has grown into a global enterprise.
examples.zh: 這家公司成立於1995年，現已發展成跨國企業。

toeic.meaning_zh: 比較級用於兩者比較（adj-er than / more adj than），最高級用於三者以上（the adj-est / the most adj），須注意不規則變化。
toeic.structure: S + V + adj-er/more adj + than ... / the adj-est/most adj + (in/of)

examples.en: This year's revenue is significantly higher than last year's.
examples.zh: 今年的營收顯著高於去年。

examples.en: She is the most qualified candidate in our applicant pool.
examples.zh: 她是我們應徵者中最合格的候選人。

toeic.meaning_zh: 對等連接詞前後須使用相同詞性或結構。not only...but also, both...and, either...or, neither...nor 須維持對稱。
toeic.structure: not only + X + but also + X (X = same part of speech)

examples.en: The new software is not only user-friendly but also cost-effective.
examples.zh: 這款新軟體不僅好用而且具成本效益。

examples.en: Either the manager or his assistant will attend the conference.
examples.zh: 經理或他的助理之中會有一位出席會議。

toeic.meaning_zh: although, even though, though 後接完整子句，表達讓步或對比關係；despite/in spite of 後接名詞或動名詞。
toeic.structure: Although/Even though + S + V, S + V / Despite/In spite of + N/V-ing, S + V

examples.en: Although the budget was limited, the project was completed on schedule.
examples.zh: 雖然預算有限，這個專案仍如期完成。

examples.en: Despite the heavy traffic, the delegates arrived on time.
examples.zh: 儘管交通壅塞，代表們仍準時抵達。

toeic.meaning_zh: because, since, as 後接子句表原因；owing to, due to, because of 後接名詞或動名詞表原因。
toeic.structure: Because/Since/As + S + V / Owing to/Due to + N

examples.en: The launch was delayed because the supplier could not meet the deadline.
examples.zh: 發表會延後是因為供應商無法在期限內交貨。

examples.en: Owing to inclement weather, the outdoor event has been postponed.
examples.zh: 由於天候不佳，戶外活動已延期。

toeic.pattern: Time Conjunctions (when/while/as soon as/by the time)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於連接兩個動作的時間關係。when 表「當…時」、while 表「在…期間」、as soon as 表「一…就」、by the time 表「到…時」。
toeic.structure: When/While/As soon as/By the time + S + V, S + V

examples.en: As soon as the contract is signed, we will begin production.
examples.zh: 合約一簽妥，我們就會開始生產。

examples.en: While the auditors were reviewing the books, the staff prepared additional reports.
examples.zh: 在稽核員審查帳目期間，員工準備了補充報告。

toeic.meaning_zh: in 用於月份、年份、季節、世紀；on 用於日期、星期；at 用於確切時間點。是 TOEIC 高頻測驗點。
toeic.structure: in + month/year/season ; on + day/date ; at + clock time

examples.en: The shareholders' meeting will be held on March 15 at 10 a.m.
examples.zh: 股東會將於三月十五日上午十點舉行。

examples.en: Our company was founded in 1998 in Taipei.
examples.zh: 我們公司於1998年在台北成立。

toeic.meaning_zh: by 表「在…之前完成」（單次動作的截止時間）；until/till 表「直到…為止」（動作持續到該時間點）。
toeic.structure: by + deadline (one-time action) / until + ending time (continuous action)

examples.en: Please submit your expense report by Friday.
examples.zh: 請在週五之前繳交您的報帳單。

examples.en: The construction site will remain closed until further notice.
examples.zh: 施工現場將關閉至另行通知為止。

toeic.meaning_zh: for 後接一段時間（持續多久）；since 後接時間起點（從何時開始）。常與完成式連用。
toeic.structure: for + duration / since + starting point

examples.en: Mr. Wang has worked at this firm for over twenty years.
examples.zh: 王先生已在這家公司工作超過二十年。

examples.en: She has been the head of marketing since 2019.
examples.zh: 她自2019年起就擔任行銷主管。

toeic.meaning_zh: 商務英文中用於引介主題的正式介系詞片語：regarding, concerning, with regard to, in regard to, as regards 皆表「關於」。
toeic.structure: Regarding/Concerning/With regard to + N, S + V

examples.en: Regarding your inquiry, we will respond within two business days.
examples.zh: 關於您的詢問，我們將於兩個工作天內回覆。

examples.en: I am writing on behalf of our CEO concerning the upcoming partnership.
examples.zh: 我代表本公司執行長就即將到來的合作關係致函。

toeic.meaning_zh: a/an 用於可數名詞單數的初次提及；the 用於特定指稱或第二次提及；零冠詞用於不可數或泛指複數。
toeic.structure: a/an + singular countable (first mention) ; the + specific noun ; zero + general plural/uncountable

examples.en: We received an email from a new client; the email contained an urgent request.
examples.zh: 我們收到一位新客戶的電子郵件；那封信中含有緊急要求。

examples.en: Honesty is the most important quality in business relationships.
examples.zh: 誠信是商業關係中最重要的特質。

toeic.pattern: Modal Verbs of Past Speculation (must/might/could have)
toeic.meaning_zh: must have + p.p. 表「過去一定…」（高度肯定推測）；might/could have + p.p. 表「過去可能…」（不確定推測）；can't have + p.p. 表「過去不可能…」。
toeic.structure: S + must/might/could/can't + have + p.p.

examples.en: The shipment must have been delayed by the storm.
examples.zh: 那批貨物想必是因暴風雨而延誤。

examples.en: The accountant might have overlooked some entries in the spreadsheet.
examples.zh: 會計師可能漏看了試算表中的一些項目。

toeic.pattern: Modal Verbs of Past Regret (should have / ought to have)
toeic.meaning_zh: should have / ought to have + p.p. 表「當時應該…但沒有」，shouldn't have + p.p. 表「當時不該…卻做了」，常用於表達遺憾或批評。
toeic.structure: S + should/ought to + have + p.p.

examples.en: We should have signed the agreement when the price was lower.
examples.zh: 我們當時應該在價格較低時就簽下協議。

examples.en: The marketing team ought to have consulted the legal department first.
examples.zh: 行銷團隊當時應該先諮詢法務部門。

toeic.meaning_zh: had better + V (原形) 表強烈建議或警告（最好…）；would rather + V (原形) 表偏好（寧願…），否定為 had better not / would rather not。
toeic.structure: S + had better (not) / would rather (not) + V

examples.en: You had better confirm the reservation before noon.
examples.zh: 你最好在中午之前確認訂位。

examples.en: I would rather schedule the interview for next Monday.
examples.zh: 我寧願將面試安排在下週一。

toeic.meaning_zh: much 與 little 修飾不可數名詞，many 與 few 修飾可數名詞複數。a few/a little 表「有一些」（肯定），few/little 表「幾乎沒有」（否定）。
toeic.structure: much/(a) little + uncountable ; many/(a) few + plural countable

examples.en: We have very little time to finalize the budget proposal.
examples.zh: 我們幾乎沒什麼時間來敲定預算提案。

examples.en: A few applicants have already accepted our job offer.
examples.zh: 已有幾位應徵者接受了我們的工作邀約。

toeic.meaning_zh: 句首使用 Never, Hardly, Seldom, Rarely, Not only, Only then, No sooner 等否定/限定副詞時，主詞與助動詞須倒裝。
toeic.structure: Never/Hardly/Not only + Aux + S + V (+ but also ...)

examples.en: Never have we faced such a challenging market environment.
examples.zh: 我們從未面臨如此艱困的市場環境。

examples.en: Not only did the firm exceed its targets, but it also expanded internationally.
examples.zh: 這家公司不僅超越目標，更拓展至國際市場。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於強調句中某一成分。It is/was + 強調部分 + that/who + 其餘子句；What + S + V + is + 強調部分。
toeic.structure: It is/was + emphasized part + that/who + S + V / What + S + V + is + N

examples.en: It was the marketing director who proposed the new branding strategy.
examples.zh: 正是行銷總監提出了新的品牌策略。

examples.en: What our clients value most is reliable customer support.
examples.zh: 我們的客戶最重視的是可靠的客戶支援。

toeic.meaning_zh: have/get + 物 + p.p. 表「請人做某事」（被動使役），強調事情被完成而非執行者。
toeic.structure: S + have/get + thing + p.p. (+ by someone)

examples.en: We had the office repainted over the weekend.
examples.zh: 我們利用週末請人把辦公室重新粉刷。

examples.en: She got the contract translated by a certified translator.
examples.zh: 她請一位認證翻譯員翻譯了那份合約。

toeic.meaning_zh: make/let/have + 人 + 原形動詞 表「使/讓/請某人做某事」；help 後可接原形動詞或不定詞；其他使役則用 get + 人 + to V。
toeic.structure: S + make/let/have + O + V (base) / get + O + to V

examples.en: The supervisor had the new hires complete the orientation forms.
examples.zh: 主管請新進人員填妥新人訓練表格。

examples.en: We finally got the vendor to lower the price by 10 percent.
examples.zh: 我們終於說服供應商降價百分之十。

toeic.pattern: Phrasal Patterns with V-ing (look forward to / be used to)
toeic.meaning_zh: look forward to, be used to, get used to, object to, be opposed to, in addition to 中的 to 是介系詞，後接動名詞 (V-ing)，而非原形動詞。
toeic.structure: S + look forward to / be (get) used to / object to + V-ing

examples.en: I look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience.
examples.zh: 期盼能盡早收到您的回覆。

examples.en: The team is gradually getting used to working remotely.
examples.zh: 團隊正逐漸習慣遠距工作。

toeic.pattern: Future Expressions (be about to / be due to)
toeic.meaning_zh: be going to 表計畫或預測；will 表瞬間決定或預測；be about to 表「即將…」（不久後就會發生）；be due to 表「預定於…」。
toeic.structure: S + be going to / will / be about to / be due to + V

examples.en: The flight from Singapore is due to arrive at 3:45 p.m.
examples.zh: 從新加坡來的班機預定於下午三點四十五分抵達。

examples.en: We are about to release the financial results for the third quarter.
examples.zh: 我們即將發布第三季的財務報告。

toeic.meaning_zh: 附加問句的助動詞與主詞須與主句一致；肯定句配否定附加，否定句配肯定附加。
toeic.structure: Affirmative S + V, + negative aux + pronoun? / Negative S + V, + affirmative aux + pronoun?

examples.en: You have already filed the tax documents, haven't you?
examples.zh: 你已經繳交稅務文件了，不是嗎？

examples.en: The supplier doesn't deliver on Sundays, does he?
examples.zh: 供應商週日不送貨，對吧？

toeic.meaning_zh: TOEIC 常測驗同一字根的不同詞性。名詞、形容詞、副詞、動詞之間須根據句中位置與功能選擇正確形式。
toeic.structure: noun (-tion/-ment/-ity) / adjective (-ful/-ive/-ous) / adverb (-ly) / verb

examples.en: The product launch was a tremendous success and was managed successfully by the new team.
examples.zh: 這次產品發表非常成功，並由新團隊成功地執行。

examples.en: Her successful presentation impressed the international investors.
examples.zh: 她成功的簡報讓國際投資人印象深刻。

toeic.meaning_zh: affect 通常為動詞，意為「影響」；effect 通常為名詞，意為「影響、效果」。effect 偶爾作動詞表「使產生、實現」（如 effect change）。
toeic.structure: affect (v.) = to influence ; effect (n.) = result/influence

examples.en: The new tax policy will affect every small business in the region.
examples.zh: 新的稅收政策將影響該地區的每一家小型企業。

examples.en: The merger had a positive effect on the company's stock price.
examples.zh: 合併對公司的股價帶來正面的影響。

toeic.meaning_zh: fewer 修飾可數名詞複數（fewer employees）；less 修飾不可數名詞（less time, less money）。為 TOEIC Part 5 高頻測驗點。
toeic.structure: fewer + countable plural noun ; less + uncountable noun

examples.en: Fewer customers visited the store this month due to the renovation.
examples.zh: 由於整修工程，本月光顧店面的顧客減少了。

examples.en: We need to spend less money on non-essential expenses.
examples.zh: 我們必須減少非必要開銷的支出。

toeic.pattern: Tricky Pairs: in time vs on time
toeic.meaning_zh: on time 表「準時、按時」（不早不晚）；in time 表「及時、來得及」（在期限之前留有餘裕）。
toeic.structure: on time = punctual ; in time (for sth / to V) = early enough

examples.en: The conference began exactly on time at 9 a.m.
examples.zh: 研討會在上午九點準時開始。

examples.en: We arrived just in time to catch the last presentation.
examples.zh: 我們及時趕到，正好趕上最後一場簡報。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達習慣、事實、時刻表，或公司例行運作。商業情境常用於描述定期會議、政策或市場規律。
toeic.structure: S + V(s/es) + O

examples.en: Our company holds a board meeting every Monday morning.
examples.zh: 我們公司每週一早上召開董事會。

examples.en: The Tokyo branch opens at nine and closes at six.
examples.zh: 東京分公司九點開門、六點關門。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述此刻正在進行的動作或現階段暫時的趨勢，多益常見於描述會議進行中或專案推進中。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + V-ing

examples.en: The technicians are installing new servers in the data center right now.
examples.zh: 技術人員目前正在資料中心安裝新伺服器。

examples.en: We are currently revising the quarterly sales report.
examples.zh: 我們目前正在修訂季度銷售報告。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於明確過去時間點已完成的動作，多益商業情境常搭配 yesterday、last week、in 2023 等時間副詞。
toeic.structure: S + V-ed / V2 + O

examples.en: The CEO announced the merger at last week's press conference.
examples.zh: 執行長在上週的記者會上宣布了合併案。

examples.en: We launched the new product line in March 2024.
examples.zh: 我們在 2024 年三月推出了新產品線。

toeic.pattern: Past Continuous (Action in Progress in the Past)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述過去某時刻正在進行的動作，常與 when / while 搭配，描述被打斷的情境。
toeic.structure: S + was/were + V-ing

examples.en: The accountants were reviewing the invoices when the auditor arrived.
examples.zh: 稽核員抵達時，會計師們正在審查發票。

examples.en: While the manager was presenting, the projector suddenly malfunctioned.
examples.zh: 當經理在簡報時，投影機突然故障了。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達從過去到現在累積的經驗，常搭配 ever、never、before。多益常考應徵者過往經歷。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + p.p.

examples.en: Ms. Tanaka has worked with international clients for over a decade.
examples.zh: 田中小姐已與國際客戶合作超過十年。

examples.en: Have you ever attended a trade show in Singapore?
examples.zh: 你曾經參加過新加坡的貿易展嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於剛剛完成且對現在仍有影響的動作，常與 just、already、recently、lately 搭配。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + just/already + p.p.

examples.en: The HR department has just finalized the new hiring policy.
examples.zh: 人資部門剛剛完成了新的招聘政策。

examples.en: We have already submitted the proposal to the board.
examples.zh: 我們已經將提案提交給董事會。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於從過去持續到現在的動作或狀態，常與 for、since、so far 搭配，多益常考營運與任期。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + p.p. + for/since ...

examples.en: The company has operated in Asia since 1998.
examples.zh: 該公司自 1998 年起便在亞洲營運。

examples.en: Sales have increased steadily for the past three quarters.
examples.zh: 過去三個季度的銷售持續穩定成長。

toeic.pattern: Present Perfect Continuous (Duration of Recent Action)
toeic.meaning_zh: 強調動作從過去持續到現在的時間長度，並可能仍在進行，常與 for、since、all day 搭配。
toeic.structure: S + have/has + been + V-ing

examples.en: The marketing team has been preparing the launch campaign for two months.
examples.zh: 行銷團隊已籌備發布活動兩個月了。

examples.en: I have been waiting for the supplier's reply since Monday.
examples.zh: 我從週一就一直在等供應商的回覆。

toeic.pattern: Past Perfect (Action Before Another Past Action)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達在另一個過去動作之前已完成的動作，常與 by the time、before、after 搭配。
toeic.structure: S + had + p.p.

examples.en: By the time the auditor arrived, the staff had prepared all the documents.
examples.zh: 稽核員抵達時，員工們已經備妥所有文件。

examples.en: The shipment had already left the warehouse before we received the cancellation.
examples.zh: 我們收到取消通知之前，貨物已經離開倉庫了。

toeic.pattern: Past Perfect Continuous (Duration Before a Past Point)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於強調某動作在過去某時點之前已持續一段時間，常用於描述長期努力或加班的累積。
toeic.structure: S + had + been + V-ing

examples.en: The engineers had been testing the prototype for six months before the recall.
examples.zh: 在召回事件發生前，工程師已測試原型機六個月。

examples.en: She had been negotiating the contract for weeks before both sides signed.
examples.zh: 雙方簽約前，她已協商這份合約好幾週。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於當下決定、預測、承諾或保證，多益常見於回覆客戶或安排會議。
toeic.structure: S + will + V

examples.en: I will send you the revised contract by the end of the day.
examples.zh: 我會在今天結束前把修訂後的合約寄給您。

examples.en: The board will announce the results next Friday.
examples.zh: 董事會將於下週五公布結果。

toeic.pattern: Future Continuous (Action in Progress in the Future)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述未來某時刻正在進行的動作，多益常用於行程安排與商務行程預告。
toeic.structure: S + will + be + V-ing

examples.en: At this time tomorrow, our delegation will be flying to Frankfurt.
examples.zh: 明天此時，我們的代表團將正在飛往法蘭克福。

examples.en: The interns will be attending orientation throughout next week.
examples.zh: 實習生們下週整週都將參加新人訓練。

toeic.pattern: Future Perfect (Action Completed by a Future Point)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表示在未來某個時間點之前將完成的動作，常與 by + 未來時間 搭配，多益常考截止日。
toeic.structure: S + will + have + p.p.

examples.en: By next month, we will have launched the updated mobile application.
examples.zh: 到下個月，我們將已推出更新版的行動應用程式。

examples.en: The renovation will have finished by the time the new tenants move in.
examples.zh: 新房客搬入前，裝修就會完工。

toeic.pattern: Future Perfect Continuous (Duration up to a Future Point)
toeic.meaning_zh: 用於強調某動作到未來某時刻為止已持續的時間長度，多益常考工作年資與專案進度。
toeic.structure: S + will + have + been + V-ing

examples.en: By December, Mr. Lee will have been managing the Taipei office for ten years.
examples.zh: 到十二月，李先生管理台北辦公室將屆滿十年。

examples.en: Next week, we will have been negotiating this deal for three months.
examples.zh: 到下週，我們協商這筆交易將滿三個月。

toeic.pattern: Going to vs. Will (Plan vs. Decision)
toeic.meaning_zh: going to 用於已計畫好的未來或有跡象的預測；will 用於當下決定、承諾或無根據的推測。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + going to + V  /  S + will + V

examples.en: We are going to expand into Vietnam next year, as the budget has been approved.
examples.zh: 明年我們將拓展至越南，因為預算已通過。

examples.en: OK, I will email the client right now to confirm the meeting.
examples.zh: 好的，我現在就寫信給客戶確認會議。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表達即將發生的動作，比 will 或 going to 更迫近，常用於會議或活動即將開始的提示。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + about to + V

examples.en: The conference call is about to begin, so please mute your microphones.
examples.zh: 電話會議即將開始，請大家將麥克風靜音。

examples.en: We were about to sign the agreement when the lawyer raised a concern.
examples.zh: 我們正要簽訂協議時，律師提出了疑慮。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表達依照時刻表或計畫預定要發生的事，多益常見於航班、貨運、報告繳交。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + due to + V

examples.en: The shipment is due to arrive at the port on Thursday morning.
examples.zh: 貨物預定於週四上午抵達港口。

examples.en: The quarterly report is due to be released next week.
examples.zh: 季報預定於下週發布。

toeic.pattern: Be on the Verge of (On the Point of Doing)
toeic.meaning_zh: 表示瀕臨或即將做某事，常用於商業上瀕臨破產、瀕臨達成協議等情境。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + on the verge of + V-ing / N

examples.en: The startup is on the verge of securing a major investment round.
examples.zh: 這家新創公司即將獲得一輪大型投資。

examples.en: Two of our competitors are on the verge of bankruptcy.
examples.zh: 我們有兩個競爭對手瀕臨破產。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表示按規定、計畫或他人期待應該做某事，常含未實現的暗示。多益常考工作職責與規定。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + supposed to + V

examples.en: All employees are supposed to wear ID badges in the building.
examples.zh: 所有員工在大樓內都應該配戴識別證。

examples.en: The package was supposed to arrive yesterday, but it is still in transit.
examples.zh: 包裹原本應該昨天到貨，但仍在運送途中。

toeic.meaning_zh: used to 可表過去習慣或過去狀態；would 僅表過去重複動作，不能用於狀態。
toeic.structure: S + used to + V  /  S + would + V

examples.en: Our department used to be located on the fifth floor before the relocation.
examples.zh: 在搬遷之前，我們部門位於五樓。

examples.en: Every Friday, the manager would treat the team to lunch.
examples.zh: 每週五，經理都會請團隊吃午餐。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表示「漸漸習慣於」某事，強調適應的過程。多益常見於新員工適應新工作。
toeic.structure: S + get / got + used to + V-ing / N

examples.en: New hires usually get used to the company culture within a few weeks.
examples.zh: 新進員工通常會在數週內習慣公司文化。

examples.en: It took me a while to get used to working remotely.
examples.zh: 我花了一段時間才習慣遠距工作。

toeic.pattern: Be Used to + V-ing (Be Accustomed To)
toeic.meaning_zh: 表示「已經習慣於」某事的狀態，後接動名詞或名詞，與 used to + V（過去習慣）不同。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + used to + V-ing / N

examples.en: Ms. Garcia is used to giving presentations to large audiences.
examples.zh: 賈西亞小姐已習慣對大型聽眾做簡報。

examples.en: Our team is used to working under tight deadlines.
examples.zh: 我們團隊已習慣在緊迫的截止期限下工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: 強調動作的承受者，或當動作者不重要、不明、不想提及時使用，多益常見於流程與政策說明。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + p.p. (+ by + agent)

examples.en: All invoices are processed by the finance department.
examples.zh: 所有發票都由財務部處理。

examples.en: The conference room is cleaned every evening.
examples.zh: 會議室每晚都會清潔。

toeic.meaning_zh: 強調過去動作的承受者，多益常用於公告事件、決議與結果。
toeic.structure: S + was/were + p.p. (+ by + agent)

examples.en: The proposal was approved by the board last Friday.
examples.zh: 該提案上週五獲得董事會批准。

examples.en: Three new branches were opened in Southeast Asia last year.
examples.zh: 去年在東南亞開設了三家新分店。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於描述未來將被執行的動作，多益常見於宣布即將實施的政策或將發布的產品。
toeic.structure: S + will + be + p.p.

examples.en: The annual report will be released next Monday.
examples.zh: 年報將於下週一發布。

examples.en: All applications will be reviewed by the hiring committee.
examples.zh: 所有申請都將由招聘委員會審查。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於強調目前正被執行的動作，多益常見於描述施工、檢修、處理中的案件。
toeic.structure: S + am/is/are + being + p.p.

examples.en: The lobby is being renovated this week.
examples.zh: 本週大廳正在裝修。

examples.en: Your refund request is currently being processed.
examples.zh: 您的退款申請目前正在處理中。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達在某個過去時點之前已完成的被動動作，常見於敘事或調查報告。
toeic.structure: S + had + been + p.p.

examples.en: By the time we arrived, the contracts had been signed.
examples.zh: 我們抵達時，合約早已簽署完畢。

examples.en: All defective units had been recalled before the lawsuit was filed.
examples.zh: 在訴訟提起之前，所有瑕疵品都已被召回。

toeic.meaning_zh: 情態動詞的被動式，用於表達應該被、可以被、必須被執行的事，多益常考規定與建議。
toeic.structure: S + modal (must/should/can/may) + be + p.p.

examples.en: All expense reports must be submitted by the fifth of each month.
examples.zh: 所有費用報告必須在每月五號前提交。

examples.en: Confidential documents should be stored in the locked cabinet.
examples.zh: 機密文件應存放於上鎖的櫃子中。

toeic.pattern: Passive of Modal Perfect (Modal + have been + p.p.)
toeic.meaning_zh: 情態動詞 + 完成式的被動，用於對過去事件的推測、責備或假設，多益常見於調查與檢討。
toeic.structure: S + modal + have + been + p.p.

examples.en: The error must have been caused by a software glitch.
examples.zh: 這個錯誤一定是由軟體故障造成的。

examples.en: The invoice should have been paid by last Friday.
examples.zh: 這張發票本應在上週五前付清。

toeic.meaning_zh: 完成分詞片語，表示在主句動作之前已完成的動作，可簡化「after + V-ing」或副詞子句。
toeic.structure: Having + p.p., S + V

examples.en: Having reviewed the proposal, the committee voted to approve it.
examples.zh: 委員會在審閱提案後，投票通過了它。

examples.en: Having worked overseas for years, she easily adapted to the new role.
examples.zh: 由於曾在海外工作多年，她輕鬆適應了新職位。

toeic.pattern: Present Participle vs. Past Participle as Adjective
toeic.meaning_zh: V-ing 形容詞修飾「使人產生感覺的事物」；V-ed 形容詞描述「人本身的感覺或被動狀態」。
toeic.structure: V-ing (active/cause) vs. V-ed (passive/feeling)

examples.en: The keynote speech was inspiring, and all the attendees felt inspired.
examples.zh: 主題演說令人振奮，所有與會者都感到備受鼓舞。

examples.en: The training session was exhausting; the new hires were completely exhausted.
examples.zh: 培訓課程令人疲憊，新進員工們完全筋疲力盡了。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達科學事實、一般真理或必然結果，if 可換成 when，多益常見於操作流程說明。
toeic.structure: If + S + V (present), S + V (present)

examples.en: If you press this button, the printer automatically starts scanning.
examples.zh: 如果按下這個按鈕，印表機就會自動開始掃描。

examples.en: When orders exceed 100 units, the system applies a bulk discount.
examples.zh: 當訂單超過 100 件時，系統就會套用大宗折扣。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達未來可能實現的條件與結果，多益常見於商業承諾與決策。
toeic.structure: If + S + V (present), S + will + V

examples.en: If we sign the contract today, the supplier will offer a ten percent discount.
examples.zh: 如果我們今天簽約，供應商將提供九折優惠。

examples.en: If you arrive before nine, you will catch the morning briefing.
examples.zh: 如果你九點前抵達，就能參加晨會。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於與現在事實相反的假設或不太可能發生的未來情況，多益常見於假想策略討論。
toeic.structure: If + S + V (past), S + would + V

examples.en: If our budget were larger, we would hire two more designers.
examples.zh: 如果預算更充裕，我們會多聘兩位設計師。

examples.en: If I were the CEO, I would restructure the marketing division.
examples.zh: 如果我是執行長，我會重組行銷部門。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於與過去事實相反的假設，常用於檢討與後悔，多益常考案例分析。
toeic.structure: If + S + had + p.p., S + would have + p.p.

examples.en: If we had launched the product earlier, we would have captured a larger market share.
examples.zh: 如果我們更早推出產品，就能搶下更大的市佔率。

examples.en: If the manager had checked the figures, the error would not have occurred.
examples.zh: 如果經理當時核對過數字，這個錯誤就不會發生。

toeic.meaning_zh: 混合條件句，過去未發生的條件造成現在的結果，常用於反省過去決策對現況的影響。
toeic.structure: If + S + had + p.p., S + would + V (now)

examples.en: If we had invested in automation last year, we would not be facing a labor shortage now.
examples.zh: 如果我們去年投資自動化，現在就不會面臨人力短缺。

examples.en: If she had accepted the offer, she would be working in London today.
examples.zh: 如果她當初接受了這份工作，現在就會在倫敦上班。

toeic.meaning_zh: 省略 if，將 had 倒裝至句首，使語氣更正式，多益閱讀常見於商業書信與報告。
toeic.structure: Had + S + p.p., S + would have + p.p.

examples.en: Had we anticipated the demand, we would have produced more units.
examples.zh: 倘若我們預估到需求，就會生產更多商品。

examples.en: Had the client called earlier, the issue would have been resolved sooner.
examples.zh: 若客戶早一點來電，問題本可更快獲得解決。

toeic.meaning_zh: 省略 if，將 were 倒裝至句首，用於與現在或未來不太可能事實相反的假設，語氣正式。
toeic.structure: Were + S + (to + V) / N, S + would + V

examples.en: Were the merger to proceed, both companies would benefit significantly.
examples.zh: 倘若合併案推進，兩家公司都將大幅受益。

examples.en: Were I in your position, I would consult the legal department first.
examples.zh: 若我處於你的位置，我會先諮詢法務部門。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用 should 倒裝開頭，表達「萬一」或「若有」，語氣禮貌正式，常見於商業書信。
toeic.structure: Should + S + V, S + will / imperative

examples.en: Should you have any questions, please contact our support team.
examples.zh: 若您有任何疑問，請聯繫我們的客服團隊。

examples.en: Should the shipment be delayed, we will notify you immediately.
examples.zh: 萬一貨運延遲，我們會立即通知您。

toeic.pattern: Conditional with Unless / Provided / As Long As
toeic.meaning_zh: unless 等於 if not；provided / as long as 表「只要」，用於設定前提條件。
toeic.structure: Unless / Provided (that) / As long as + S + V, S + V

examples.en: Unless the contract is signed today, the discount will expire.
examples.zh: 除非合約今天簽妥，否則折扣將失效。

examples.en: We will extend the deadline provided that you submit a written request.
examples.zh: 只要您提出書面申請，我們就會延長期限。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表達對現在情況不滿的願望，動詞使用過去式，與第二條件句的時態邏輯相同。
toeic.structure: S + wish (that) + S + V (past)

examples.en: I wish our office were closer to the train station.
examples.zh: 真希望我們的辦公室離火車站更近些。

examples.en: The manager wishes he had more time to mentor the interns.
examples.zh: 經理希望自己能有更多時間指導實習生。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表達對過去事情的遺憾，與第三條件句的時態邏輯相同，多益常考檢討情境。
toeic.structure: S + wish (that) + S + had + p.p.

examples.en: We wish we had accepted the partnership offer last spring.
examples.zh: 我們真希望去年春天接受了那次合作邀請。

examples.en: She wishes she had attended the leadership training program.
examples.zh: 她希望自己當時參加了領導力培訓課程。

toeic.meaning_zh: 用於表達希望別人改變行為的不滿，或希望某事發生改變；通常不用於自己。
toeic.structure: S + wish (that) + S + would + V

examples.en: I wish the suppliers would respond to our inquiries more promptly.
examples.zh: 真希望供應商能更迅速地回覆我們的詢問。

examples.en: The staff wish management would communicate changes earlier.
examples.zh: 員工們希望管理層能更早溝通變動事項。

toeic.meaning_zh: 比 wish 語氣更強烈的遺憾或願望，可搭配過去式（現在遺憾）或 had + p.p.（過去遺憾）。
toeic.structure: If only + S + V (past) / had + p.p.

examples.en: If only we had more qualified candidates to interview.
examples.zh: 要是我們有更多合格的候選人可面試就好了。

examples.en: If only the team had double-checked the figures before the presentation.
examples.zh: 若團隊在簡報前再核對一次數字就好了。

toeic.pattern: Subjunctive in Noun Clauses (Suggest / Recommend / Insist)
toeic.meaning_zh: 建議、要求、堅持類動詞後的 that 子句中，動詞使用原形（虛擬語氣），主詞無人稱變化。
toeic.structure: S + suggest / recommend / insist + that + S + V (base form)

examples.en: The consultant recommended that the company restructure its sales team.
examples.zh: 顧問建議該公司重組其銷售團隊。

examples.en: The director insisted that every report be reviewed twice.
examples.zh: 主管堅持每份報告都須經兩次審核。

toeic.pattern: Subjunctive with Demand / Request / Propose / Urge / Ask
toeic.meaning_zh: 要求、請求、提議類動詞後接 that 子句時，主動或被動皆需使用原形動詞。
toeic.structure: S + demand / request / propose / urge / ask + that + S + V (base form)

examples.en: The auditor demanded that all financial records be made available immediately.
examples.zh: 稽核員要求立即提供所有財務記錄。

examples.en: The committee proposed that the deadline be extended by two weeks.
examples.zh: 委員會提議將截止期限延長兩週。

toeic.pattern: Subjunctive with Important / Essential / Necessary That
toeic.meaning_zh: 重要性形容詞 + that 子句時，動詞需使用原形，表達建議或必要的虛擬語氣。
toeic.structure: It is + important / essential / necessary / vital + that + S + V (base form)

examples.en: It is essential that every employee complete the compliance training.
examples.zh: 每位員工都必須完成法規遵循培訓。

examples.en: It is necessary that the contract be reviewed by our legal counsel.
examples.zh: 這份合約必須經由我方法律顧問審閱。

toeic.meaning_zh: 間接引述他人話語時，時態通常後退一格，人稱與時間副詞也需調整；命令用 tell + O + to V。
toeic.structure: S + said / told / asked + (that / wh- / to + V) ...

examples.en: The manager said that the project would be completed by Friday.
examples.zh: 經理表示該專案將於週五前完成。

examples.en: The client asked whether we could lower the price, and told us to revise the quote.
examples.zh: 客戶詢問我們是否能降價，並要求我們修訂報價。

toeic.meaning_zh: 情態動詞 + 完成式用於對過去事件的推測（must/might/could have）或後悔（should/could have）。多益常考檢討情境。
toeic.structure: S + must / might / could / should + have + p.p.

examples.en: The package must have been delivered to the wrong address.
examples.zh: 包裹一定是被送錯地址了。

examples.en: We should have confirmed the booking earlier; now the venue is full.
examples.zh: 我們應該早點確認預訂的；現在場地已經客滿了。

toeic.pattern: Prepositions of Time: in / on / at
toeic.meaning_zh: 時間介系詞的基本用法：at 用於明確時間點，on 用於日期或星期，in 用於月份、年份、世紀或較長時段。
toeic.structure: at + clock time / on + day or date / in + month, year, or longer period

examples.en: The board meeting starts at 9:00 a.m. on Monday in October.
examples.zh: 董事會會議於十月份星期一上午九點開始。

examples.en: Our new branch will open in the third quarter of this fiscal year.
examples.zh: 我們的新分公司將於本財年第三季開幕。

toeic.meaning_zh: by 表示「在某時點之前完成」的截止期限；until 表示「持續到某時點為止」的延續動作。
toeic.structure: by + deadline (one-time action) / until + endpoint (continuous action)

examples.en: Please submit the expense report by Friday afternoon.
examples.zh: 請於星期五下午之前繳交報帳單。

examples.en: The help desk remains available until 8:00 p.m. on weekdays.
examples.zh: 服務台於平日營業至晚間八點。

toeic.meaning_zh: for 後接「時間長度」；since 後接「起始時間點」，兩者常與完成式連用。
toeic.structure: for + duration / since + point in time, both with present perfect

examples.en: Ms. Chen has worked for the firm for over fifteen years.
examples.zh: 陳女士在該公司任職已超過十五年。

examples.en: Sales have grown steadily since the rebranding campaign launched.
examples.zh: 自從品牌重塑活動推出以來，銷售持續穩定成長。

toeic.meaning_zh: within 表示「在某段時間內」，強調時限範圍。
toeic.structure: within + period of time

examples.en: All refund requests will be processed within five business days.
examples.zh: 所有退款申請將於五個工作日內處理完畢。

examples.en: The shipment must arrive within 48 hours of dispatch.
examples.zh: 貨物必須在發貨後 48 小時內送達。

toeic.pattern: Prepositions of Place: in / on / at
toeic.meaning_zh: at 用於明確地點，on 用於表面或樓層，in 用於封閉空間或大範圍區域。
toeic.structure: at + specific point / on + surface or floor / in + enclosed space or area

examples.en: The conference will be held at the Grand Hotel on the fourth floor.
examples.zh: 會議將於大飯店四樓舉辦。

examples.en: Our regional office is located in downtown Singapore.
examples.zh: 我們的區域辦公室位於新加坡市中心。

toeic.pattern: Spatial Prepositions: over / under / between / among
toeic.meaning_zh: over 在上方覆蓋，under 在下方，between 用於兩者之間，among 用於三者或以上之中。
toeic.structure: between + two entities / among + three or more / over and under for vertical position

examples.en: Profits were divided between the two co-founders, while bonuses were distributed among the staff.
examples.zh: 利潤由兩位共同創辦人分配，而獎金則在員工之間分發。

examples.en: The projector is mounted over the conference table, with cables tucked under the carpet.
examples.zh: 投影機安裝在會議桌上方，電線則藏於地毯下方。

toeic.pattern: Verb + Preposition: depend on / rely on
toeic.meaning_zh: depend on 與 rely on 皆表示「依賴、依靠」，必須搭配介系詞 on。
toeic.structure: depend / rely + on + noun or gerund

examples.en: The success of the launch depends on accurate market research.
examples.zh: 上市成功與否取決於準確的市場調查。

examples.en: Our team relies on cloud-based tools for daily collaboration.
examples.zh: 我們的團隊仰賴雲端工具進行日常協作。

toeic.pattern: Verb + Preposition: refer to / account for
toeic.meaning_zh: refer to 表示「提及、參照」；account for 表示「說明原因、佔比例」。
toeic.structure: refer to + source / account for + percentage or reason

examples.en: Please refer to the appendix for detailed financial projections.
examples.zh: 請參閱附錄以了解詳細財務預測。

examples.en: Online sales account for nearly 40 percent of total revenue.
examples.zh: 線上銷售佔總營收近 40%。

toeic.pattern: Verb + Preposition: comply with / consist of
toeic.meaning_zh: comply with 表示「遵守規定」；consist of 表示「由……組成」，兩者皆為固定搭配。
toeic.structure: comply with + rule or standard / consist of + components

examples.en: All suppliers must comply with the new environmental regulations.
examples.zh: 所有供應商必須遵守新的環保法規。

examples.en: The committee consists of representatives from each department.
examples.zh: 委員會由各部門代表組成。

toeic.pattern: Verb + Preposition: result in / result from
toeic.meaning_zh: result in 表示「導致某結果」；result from 表示「起因於某原因」，方向相反。
toeic.structure: cause + result in + effect / effect + result from + cause

examples.en: The marketing overhaul resulted in a 25 percent increase in leads.
examples.zh: 行銷改革使潛在客戶增加了 25%。

examples.en: The delay resulted from unexpected supply chain disruptions.
examples.zh: 延誤起因於意料之外的供應鏈中斷。

toeic.pattern: Verb + Preposition: succeed in / focus on / insist on
toeic.meaning_zh: 這些動詞後接介系詞時，須使用動名詞 (V-ing) 作為受詞。
toeic.structure: succeed / focus / insist + in or on + V-ing

examples.en: The startup succeeded in securing Series B funding last quarter.
examples.zh: 該新創公司於上季成功取得 B 輪融資。

examples.en: Management insists on maintaining strict quality control standards.
examples.zh: 管理階層堅持維持嚴格的品質管制標準。

toeic.pattern: look forward to / contribute to + V-ing
toeic.meaning_zh: look forward to 與 contribute to 中的 to 是介系詞，後面必須接名詞或動名詞，而非原形動詞。
toeic.structure: look forward to / contribute to + noun or V-ing

examples.en: We look forward to receiving your signed contract by the end of the week.
examples.zh: 我們期待於本週結束前收到您簽署的合約。

examples.en: Each employee contributes to building a positive workplace culture.
examples.zh: 每位員工都為打造正向職場文化付出貢獻。

toeic.pattern: Noun + Preposition: interest in / demand for / need for
toeic.meaning_zh: 特定名詞與固定介系詞搭配，TOEIC 常考。
toeic.structure: interest in + topic / demand for + product / need for + resource

examples.en: There is growing interest in renewable energy investments among institutional clients.
examples.zh: 機構客戶對再生能源投資的興趣日益增長。

examples.en: Strong demand for electric vehicles has prompted a need for additional charging stations.
examples.zh: 電動車的強勁需求促使對更多充電站的需求。

toeic.pattern: Noun + Preposition: increase in / decrease in
toeic.meaning_zh: 表示「在某方面增加或減少」時，使用介系詞 in；表示「增減幅度」時使用 of。
toeic.structure: an increase / decrease + in + area, of + amount

examples.en: The company reported a 12 percent increase in quarterly profits.
examples.zh: 公司報告季度利潤增加了 12%。

examples.en: We have seen a noticeable decrease in customer complaints since the system upgrade.
examples.zh: 自系統升級以來，客訴明顯減少。

toeic.pattern: Adjective + Preposition: responsible for / eligible for / capable of
toeic.meaning_zh: 形容詞與固定介系詞的搭配，須整組記憶。
toeic.structure: responsible / eligible + for + noun, capable + of + V-ing

examples.en: The new hire will be responsible for coordinating cross-functional projects.
examples.zh: 新進員工將負責協調跨部門專案。

examples.en: Full-time employees are eligible for tuition reimbursement after one year of service.
examples.zh: 全職員工於服務滿一年後可申請學費補助。

toeic.pattern: Adjective + Preposition: aware of / familiar with / concerned about / satisfied with
toeic.meaning_zh: 與心理狀態相關的形容詞，各自搭配不同介系詞，TOEIC 高頻考點。
toeic.structure: aware of, familiar with, concerned about, satisfied with + noun

examples.en: Please make sure all staff are aware of the updated safety protocols.
examples.zh: 請確保所有員工皆知悉更新後的安全規範。

examples.en: Clients have expressed that they are highly satisfied with our after-sales service.
examples.zh: 客戶表示對我們的售後服務非常滿意。

toeic.meaning_zh: 皆為「關於、就……而言」的正式商務介系詞，用於書信與報告。
toeic.structure: regarding / concerning / with regard to + noun

examples.en: Please contact HR regarding any questions about your benefits package.
examples.zh: 如有關於福利方案的任何疑問，請洽人力資源部。

examples.en: With regard to your invoice query, we have forwarded it to the accounts team.
examples.zh: 關於您的發票詢問，我們已轉交會計部門處理。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表示「代表某人或某團體」發言或行動。
toeic.structure: on behalf of + person or organization

examples.en: On behalf of the entire team, I would like to thank our keynote speaker.
examples.zh: 謹代表全體團隊感謝我們的主講嘉賓。

examples.en: She signed the agreement on behalf of the parent company.
examples.zh: 她代表母公司簽署了該協議。

toeic.pattern: in light of / in view of
toeic.meaning_zh: 表示「鑒於、考量到」某種情況，用於說明決策依據。
toeic.structure: in light of / in view of + noun phrase

examples.en: In light of recent market trends, we are revising our pricing strategy.
examples.zh: 鑒於近期市場趨勢，我們正在調整定價策略。

examples.en: In view of rising costs, the project budget has been increased.
examples.zh: 考量成本上升，專案預算已予以增加。

toeic.meaning_zh: 兩者皆為介系詞，表示「儘管」，後接名詞或動名詞，不可接子句。
toeic.structure: despite / in spite of + noun or V-ing

examples.en: Despite the heavy rain, the outdoor product launch proceeded as planned.
examples.zh: 儘管下著大雨，戶外產品發表會仍如期舉行。

examples.en: In spite of being understaffed, the team met every project deadline.
examples.zh: 儘管人力不足，該團隊仍按時完成每項專案。

toeic.pattern: due to / owing to / because of / thanks to
toeic.meaning_zh: 皆為表示「原因」的介系詞片語，後接名詞或動名詞。thanks to 通常用於正面結果。
toeic.structure: due to / owing to / because of / thanks to + noun phrase

examples.en: The flight was delayed due to severe weather conditions.
examples.zh: 航班因惡劣天候而延誤。

examples.en: Thanks to our loyal customers, we achieved record-breaking sales this year.
examples.zh: 感謝忠實顧客的支持，我們今年締造了破紀錄的銷售佳績。

toeic.meaning_zh: 皆為正式商務或法律文件中的介系詞：prior to 等於 before；pending 表示「待……期間」；pursuant to 表示「依據」。
toeic.structure: prior to / pending / pursuant to + noun

examples.en: All visitors must register at the front desk prior to entering the facility.
examples.zh: 所有訪客進入設施前必須先在前台登記。

examples.en: Pursuant to company policy, expense receipts must be submitted within 30 days.
examples.zh: 依據公司政策，費用收據必須於 30 天內繳交。

toeic.pattern: according to / in accordance with / in compliance with
toeic.meaning_zh: according to 表「根據（某來源）」；in accordance with 與 in compliance with 表「依照、遵守（規定）」。
toeic.structure: according to + source / in accordance with / in compliance with + regulation

examples.en: According to the latest survey, customer satisfaction has improved significantly.
examples.zh: 根據最新調查，顧客滿意度已大幅提升。

examples.en: Our manufacturing process is fully in compliance with international safety standards.
examples.zh: 我們的製造流程完全符合國際安全標準。

toeic.pattern: in conjunction with / with the exception of / in addition to
toeic.meaning_zh: in conjunction with 表「與……一同」；with the exception of 表「除……之外」；in addition to 表「除……之外還有」。
toeic.structure: in conjunction with / with the exception of / in addition to + noun

examples.en: The seminar will be held in conjunction with the annual trade fair.
examples.zh: 該研討會將與年度貿易展同期舉辦。

examples.en: In addition to a competitive salary, we offer comprehensive health benefits.
examples.zh: 除了具競爭力的薪資外，我們亦提供完整的健康福利。

toeic.meaning_zh: apart from 與 aside from 表「除了」；given 表「考量到」，作為介系詞使用。
toeic.structure: apart from / aside from + noun (exception or addition) / given + noun (consideration)

examples.en: Aside from a minor formatting issue, the report is ready for distribution.
examples.zh: 除了一個小小的格式問題外，該報告已可發送。

examples.en: Given the current economic climate, conservative forecasts are advisable.
examples.zh: 考量到目前的經濟情勢，採取保守的預測較為明智。

toeic.pattern: Conjunctions of Contrast: although / even though / though / whereas / while
toeic.meaning_zh: 皆為對比連接詞，後接完整子句。although / even though / though 表「儘管」；whereas / while 表「然而、相對地」。
toeic.structure: although / even though / though / whereas / while + subject + verb

examples.en: Although the deadline was tight, the team delivered the project on time.
examples.zh: 儘管期限緊迫，團隊仍按時交付專案。

examples.en: Sales rose in the Asian market, whereas they declined in Europe.
examples.zh: 亞洲市場銷售上升，然而歐洲市場卻下滑。

toeic.pattern: Conjunctions of Reason: because / since / as / given that / now that
toeic.meaning_zh: 皆為原因連接詞，後接子句。now that 強調「既然現在……」。
toeic.structure: because / since / as / given that / now that + subject + verb

examples.en: Given that the budget has been approved, we can begin recruitment immediately.
examples.zh: 既然預算已獲核准，我們即可立即展開招募。

examples.en: Now that the merger is complete, both teams will share a single office space.
examples.zh: 既然合併已完成，兩個團隊將共用單一辦公空間。

toeic.pattern: Conjunctions of Purpose: so that / in order that / in order to / so as to
toeic.meaning_zh: so that 與 in order that 後接子句；in order to 與 so as to 後接原形動詞，表「為了」。
toeic.structure: so that / in order that + clause / in order to / so as to + base verb

examples.en: We upgraded the server so that customers could access the portal more quickly.
examples.zh: 我們升級了伺服器，以便顧客能更快速地存取入口網站。

examples.en: Please arrive 15 minutes early in order to complete the registration process.
examples.zh: 請提前 15 分鐘抵達以完成報到程序。

toeic.meaning_zh: lest 為正式用法，表「以免、唯恐」，後接 should + 原形動詞或虛擬式。
toeic.structure: lest + subject + (should) + base verb

examples.en: Please double-check the figures lest any errors appear in the final report.
examples.zh: 請再次核對數字，以免最終報告出現任何錯誤。

examples.en: Employees must lock their laptops lest sensitive data should be compromised.
examples.zh: 員工必須鎖定筆電，以免敏感資料遭到外洩。

toeic.meaning_zh: so + 形容詞/副詞 + that；such + (a/an) + 形容詞 + 名詞 + that，皆表「如此……以致於」。
toeic.structure: so + adj or adv + that + clause / such + (a/an) + adj + noun + that + clause

examples.en: The presentation was so persuasive that the client signed the contract immediately.
examples.zh: 該簡報極具說服力，以致於客戶立即簽訂了合約。

examples.en: It was such a successful campaign that the budget was doubled for next year.
examples.zh: 那是一場如此成功的活動，以致於明年的預算增加了一倍。

toeic.pattern: Conjunctions of Condition: provided that / as long as / in case / unless
toeic.meaning_zh: provided that 與 as long as 表「只要」；in case 表「以防」；unless 表「除非」。
toeic.structure: provided that / as long as / in case / unless + clause

examples.en: You may work from home provided that you remain reachable during business hours.
examples.zh: 只要您在上班時間保持可聯繫，即可在家工作。

examples.en: Please bring a backup laptop in case the projector fails during the demo.
examples.zh: 請攜帶備用筆電以防示範時投影機故障。

toeic.pattern: Conjunctions of Time: as soon as / by the time / once
toeic.meaning_zh: as soon as 表「一……就」；by the time 表「到……時候」常搭配完成式；once 表「一旦」。
toeic.structure: as soon as / by the time / once + clause

examples.en: We will notify you as soon as your order has been shipped.
examples.zh: 您的訂單一出貨我們便會通知您。

examples.en: By the time the new manager arrived, the team had already finalized the proposal.
examples.zh: 到新經理抵達時，團隊已完成提案。

toeic.meaning_zh: 「不但……而且……」，須遵守平行結構，前後詞性相同。
toeic.structure: not only + X + but also + X (parallel form)

examples.en: The new software is not only user-friendly but also highly secure.
examples.zh: 新軟體不僅介面友善，而且高度安全。

examples.en: She not only manages the regional office but also oversees international accounts.
examples.zh: 她不僅管理區域辦公室，還負責國際客戶。

toeic.meaning_zh: both...and 必為複數動詞；either...or 與 neither...nor 採就近原則決定動詞單複數。
toeic.structure: both A and B + plural verb / either A or B / neither A nor B + verb agrees with B

examples.en: Both the CEO and the CFO are attending the shareholder meeting.
examples.zh: 執行長與財務長皆會出席股東會議。

examples.en: Neither the supervisor nor the assistants were aware of the schedule change.
examples.zh: 主管和助理們皆未察覺行程變更。

toeic.meaning_zh: whether...or 表「不論是……或是……」，可用於名詞子句或副詞子句。
toeic.structure: whether + A + or + B

examples.en: Please indicate whether you will attend in person or join the meeting remotely.
examples.zh: 請註明您將親自出席或遠端加入會議。

examples.en: Whether the merger proceeds or not, our restructuring plan remains unchanged.
examples.zh: 無論合併是否進行，我們的重組計畫均維持不變。

toeic.meaning_zh: 表「一……就……」，置於句首時須倒裝，使用過去完成式。
toeic.structure: No sooner had + S + p.p. + than + S + past / Hardly had + S + p.p. + when + S + past

examples.en: No sooner had the manager announced the bonus than the employees began applauding.
examples.zh: 經理一宣布獎金，員工們便開始鼓掌。

examples.en: Hardly had we launched the website when traffic exceeded all expectations.
examples.zh: 我們才剛推出網站，流量便超出所有預期。

toeic.meaning_zh: 限定子句不加逗號，提供必要訊息；非限定子句以逗號隔開，提供補充訊息，且不可用 that。
toeic.structure: Noun + (that/who/which) + clause / Noun, who/which + clause,

examples.en: The employees who completed the training will receive certificates next week.
examples.zh: 完成培訓的員工將於下週收到證書。

examples.en: Mr. Tanaka, who joined the firm in 2010, has been promoted to vice president.
examples.zh: 於 2010 年加入公司的田中先生已升任副總裁。

toeic.meaning_zh: 當關係子句中動詞為主動時，可化簡為現在分詞 (V-ing)；被動時則化簡為過去分詞 (p.p.)。
toeic.structure: Noun + V-ing (active) / Noun + p.p. (passive)

examples.en: The candidates applying for the position must submit a portfolio.
examples.zh: 申請該職位的候選人必須繳交作品集。

examples.en: Products manufactured in our Taiwan facility meet ISO 9001 standards.
examples.zh: 於台灣廠製造的產品符合 ISO 9001 標準。

toeic.pattern: Relative Adverbs: whose / where / when / why
toeic.meaning_zh: whose 表所屬；where 修飾地點；when 修飾時間；why 修飾原因。
toeic.structure: Noun + whose / where / when / why + clause

examples.en: The applicant whose resume impressed the panel will be invited for a second interview.
examples.zh: 履歷令面試委員印象深刻的應徵者將獲邀進行第二次面試。

examples.en: This is the conference room where the quarterly review will take place.
examples.zh: 這就是季度檢討會議將舉行的會議室。

toeic.pattern: Gerunds vs Infinitives: Verbs Taking Only One
toeic.meaning_zh: 某些動詞僅接動名詞 (enjoy, finish, suggest, consider, avoid)，某些僅接不定詞 (decide, agree, hope, plan, refuse)。
toeic.structure: Verb + V-ing (e.g., enjoy, suggest) / Verb + to V (e.g., decide, plan)

examples.en: The committee suggested postponing the launch until the next fiscal quarter.
examples.zh: 委員會建議將上市延至下一財季。

examples.en: The board decided to expand operations into the Southeast Asian market.
examples.zh: 董事會決定將業務拓展至東南亞市場。

toeic.pattern: Gerunds vs Infinitives: Different Meanings (remember / forget / stop / regret)
toeic.meaning_zh: remember/forget + to V 指未做之事；+ V-ing 指已做之事。stop + to V 指停下來去做；+ V-ing 指停止做某事。
toeic.structure: remember / forget / stop / regret + to V (future) or V-ing (past or ongoing)

examples.en: Please remember to forward the meeting minutes to all attendees.
examples.zh: 請記得將會議記錄轉發給所有與會者。

examples.en: We regret to inform you that your application has not been successful.
examples.zh: 我們很遺憾通知您，您的申請未獲錄取。

toeic.pattern: Infinitive of Purpose / Bare Infinitive after make / let / help
toeic.meaning_zh: to V 表目的；使役動詞 make/let 及助動詞 help 後接原形動詞 (bare infinitive)。
toeic.structure: S + V + to V (purpose) / make / let / help + O + base verb

examples.en: We organized a workshop to help employees develop leadership skills.
examples.zh: 我們舉辦研習營以協助員工培養領導能力。

examples.en: The new policy lets staff work flexible hours twice a week.
examples.zh: 新政策讓員工每週兩天可彈性上下班。

toeic.meaning_zh: 句首分詞片語的邏輯主詞必須與主要子句主詞一致，否則即為懸垂修飾語 (錯誤)。
toeic.structure: V-ing or p.p. phrase + , + matching subject + verb

examples.en: Reviewing the quarterly figures, the analyst identified several cost-saving opportunities.
examples.zh: 在檢視季度數據時，該分析師發現了多項節省成本的機會。

examples.en: Written in clear and concise language, the proposal won unanimous approval.
examples.zh: 由於以清晰簡潔的語言撰寫，該提案獲得一致通過。

toeic.pattern: Articles: a / an / the / Zero Article
toeic.meaning_zh: a/an 指不特定單數可數名詞；the 指特定名詞；抽象名詞、專有名詞、泛指複數通常不加冠詞。
toeic.structure: a / an + singular countable / the + specific noun / zero article + abstract or general plural

examples.en: An applicant submitted a portfolio yesterday, and the portfolio was outstanding.
examples.zh: 昨天一位應徵者繳交了一份作品集，那份作品集相當出色。

examples.en: Innovation drives sustainable growth in modern business environments.
examples.zh: 創新驅動現代商業環境中的永續成長。

toeic.pattern: Quantifiers: much / many / few / little / a few / a little
toeic.meaning_zh: much/little 修飾不可數名詞；many/few 修飾可數名詞。a few/a little 表「有一些」（肯定），few/little 表「幾乎沒有」（否定）。
toeic.structure: much / little / a little + uncountable / many / few / a few + plural countable

examples.en: We have received many inquiries but very little feedback on the new design.
examples.zh: 我們收到許多詢問，但對新設計的回饋甚少。

examples.en: There are a few minor revisions remaining before the document is finalized.
examples.zh: 在文件定稿前還有幾處細部修訂待處理。

toeic.pattern: Quantifiers: each / every / all / both / none
toeic.meaning_zh: each/every 後接單數名詞與單數動詞；both 接複數；all 視名詞而定；none 可單可複。
toeic.structure: each / every + singular noun + singular verb / both / all + plural / none of + noun

examples.en: Every employee is required to complete the annual compliance training.
examples.zh: 每位員工皆須完成年度法規遵循培訓。

examples.en: Both candidates have impressive backgrounds, but none of the references have been verified yet.
examples.zh: 兩位候選人皆具備令人讚賞的背景，但目前尚未驗證任何推薦人。

toeic.meaning_zh: 比較級用 -er/more + than；最高級用 the -est/the most + in/of；同等比較用 as + adj + as。
toeic.structure: X + comparative + than Y / the + superlative + in / of / as + adj + as

examples.en: Our latest model is more energy-efficient than any previous version on the market.
examples.zh: 我們最新的機型比市場上任何先前版本都更節能。

examples.en: Customer service remains as important as product quality in building brand loyalty.
examples.zh: 在建立品牌忠誠度上，客服與產品品質同等重要。

toeic.pattern: Parallel Comparison: The more X, the more Y
toeic.meaning_zh: 「越……就越……」的雙重比較句型，前後須對稱。
toeic.structure: The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V

examples.en: The more clients we serve, the stronger our reputation becomes.
examples.zh: 我們服務的客戶越多，我們的聲譽就越穩固。

examples.en: The earlier you register, the lower the conference fee will be.
examples.zh: 您越早報名，會議費用就越低。

toeic.meaning_zh: 省略 if 時可用倒裝 (Had/Were/Should + S)；強調句型 It is...that... 與 What...is... 用於突顯特定資訊。
toeic.structure: Had / Were / Should + S + V... / It is + X + that + clause / What + S + V + is + X

examples.en: Had we anticipated the demand, we would have increased production capacity.
examples.zh: 若我們預見到需求，便會擴增產能。

examples.en: It is the dedication of our staff that has made this milestone possible.
examples.zh: 正是我們員工的奉獻，才使這項里程碑得以實現。

toeic.pattern: Easily-Confused Word Pairs (affect/effect, fewer/less, raise/rise, accept/except, etc.)
toeic.meaning_zh: TOEIC 常考易混淆詞：affect 動詞影響、effect 名詞效果；fewer 修飾可數、less 修飾不可數；raise 及物、rise 不及物；accept 接受、except 除外；ensure 確保、insure 投保、assure 使放心；principal 主要的/校長、principle 原則。
toeic.structure: Choose the correct word based on part of speech and context

examples.en: The new tariffs will significantly affect our import costs and have a noticeable effect on retail prices.
examples.zh: 新關稅將顯著影響我們的進口成本，並對零售價格產生明顯影響。

examples.en: Fewer customers complained this quarter because the support team spent less time on hold transfers.
examples.zh: 本季客訴客戶減少，因為支援團隊花在轉接保留上的時間較少。
